title: Crypto onramping solution Fun raises $72 million Series A co-led by Multicoin Capital and SignalFire
message_html: Crypto onramping solution Fun raises $72 million Series A co-led by Multicoin Capital and SignalFire ...
snippet: Fun powers deposits, withdrawals, and settlement flows for some of crypto’s leading apps, including Polymarket, Lighter, and Aave.

title: Tether Reports Billion-Dollar Q1 Profit Amid Crypto Slump—And Says Audit Has Begun
message_html: Tether Reports Billion-Dollar Q1 Profit Amid Crypto Slump—And Says Audit Has Begun ...
snippet: Stablecoin giant Tether says it holds over $141 billion in U.S. Treasuries, a figure that has never been verified by a full audit.
